# Milton X Sarmiento - Portfolio

## About
Senior Software Architect with 20+ years of experience building scalable systems, leading engineering teams, and transforming complex business challenges into elegant solutions.

## Skills
- **Languages**: Java, C#, Python, TypeScript, Go, Rust
- **Frontend**: React, Vue.js, Flutter, React Native
- **Backend**: .NET, Spring Boot, Node.js, Django
- **Cloud**: AWS, Azure, Google Cloud Platform
- **DevOps**: Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD pipelines, Infrastructure as Code
- **Databases**: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, DynamoDB, Redis

## Experience
- Senior Software Architect: 15+ years
- Technical Leadership: 10+ years
- Full-stack Development: 20+ years
- Cloud Infrastructure: 8+ years

## Projects
Visit https://mxsarmiento.brainsolutions.nyc/projects for detailed project portfolio including:
- Enterprise scalable systems
- Cloud-native applications
- Mobile applications
- Real-time systems

## Contact
- Email: mxsarmiento@live.com

## Accessibility
This portfolio is designed with accessibility in mind:
- Semantic HTML structure
- WCAG 2.1 Level AA compliance
- Keyboard navigation support
- Screen reader optimization
- High contrast design options

## Performance
- Core Web Vitals optimized
- Lazy loading for heavy components
- Code splitting for faster loads
- Responsive design for all devices
